title: Computer Science Specialist
summary: Worked on FPGA research, automation tooling, and distributed systems for fraud detection and identification platforms.
highlights: Conducted research and built FPGA architectures for high-throughput network intrusion detection and published five peer-reviewed papers.
Developed Python tooling to auto-generate FPGA designs and speed development cycles.
Contributed to a nation-wide AFIS system and a telephone fraud detection system using distributed and parallel computing.

source.notes: Parsed from JOSE BANDE SERRANO RESUME V6.pdf
